title: Unveiling the Dynamics of India’s Unorganised Sector
description: The performance of India’s unorganised sector shows a recovery in 2023–24 after a decline in employment and labour productivity during the COVID-19 pandemic. However, compared to the organised sector, the recovery is delayed. The unorganised sector remains largely composed of microenterprises, with over 90% not reaching one-fourth of the turnover limit of the micro category, reflecting missed growth opportunities.
